name: The Pooch Parlor
tagline: A family-owned Windsor grooming salon using natural, non-toxic products — gentle, careful, and 100% recommended.
seoDescription: The Pooch Parlor is a 5-star, family-owned dog grooming salon in Windsor, CA, using natural and organic products — baths, haircuts, nail trims, and more, gently and carefully done.

sections.heading: Grooming gentle enough for the dog you’d do anything for
sections.subheading: The Pooch Parlor is a small, family-owned Windsor grooming salon that does it right every time — trained, careful groomers using natural, non-toxic products on your dog’s sensitive skin. Five stars, and 100% recommended.

sections.heading: A small shop that treats your dog like their own
body: The Pooch Parlor is family-owned and run, with groomers who are highly trained and experienced — and it shows in the reviews: five stars on Yelp and 100% of clients recommending them.

What sets them apart is what goes on the dog. They’re committed to natural and organic products, because they understand how much a pet’s sensitive skin matters. Every visit is gentle, careful, and done the way you’d do it yourself if you could.

items.title: Bathing
items.description: Warm, thorough baths with natural, non-toxic products kind to sensitive skin.

items.title: Haircuts & Styling
items.description: Breed-appropriate cuts and tidy styling, done patiently.

items.title: Nail Trimming
items.description: Careful nail trims to keep paws healthy and comfortable.

items.title: Ear Cleaning
items.description: Gentle ear cleaning as part of a complete groom.

items.title: Paw Treatments
items.description: Add-on paw treatments to soothe and protect.

items.title: Teeth Cleaning
items.description: Add-on teeth cleaning for fresher breath and better health.

sections.heading: Why Windsor trusts them with their dogs

items.title: A perfect 5-star record
items.body: Five stars on Yelp and 100% of clients recommending.

items.title: Natural products only
items.body: Non-toxic, organic products chosen for sensitive skin.

items.title: Family-owned care
items.body: A small shop where your dog isn’t just another appointment.

items.title: Right in Windsor
items.body: On Old Redwood Highway, easy to reach.

sections.heading: Time for a fresh groom?
sections.body: The Pooch Parlor is at 10333 Old Redwood Hwy, Windsor. Call (707) 838-1896 to book your dog’s spot.

sections.heading: Baths, cuts, nails — the whole groom

At 10333 Old Redwood Hwy in Windsor.
